hero.name: Builders
hero.tagline: Independent makers, one profile at a time
hero.description: A hand-kept directory of people who run their own small software studios. Run by the StoicSoft collective, open to everyone we’ve shared a long lunch with.

items.name: Clara Figueira
items.description: Runs design across StoicSoft products. Writes The Margin on Sundays. Editor of Field & Form. Lives in Lisbon.

items.name: Dante Okafor
items.description: Built and maintains the ServerCompass probe service. Wrote 62 starter templates for 1DevTool. Reads Postgres docs for fun.

items.name: Mei Wong
items.description: Shipped the retrieval layer behind Aether. Previously built Quill, a Markdown writer acquired in 2022. Published on the engineering blog.

items.name: Anya Park
items.description: Four days a week at the StoicSoft studio. Builds Routine, a habit tool with 2,400 quiet users. Tends anya.garden on Sundays.

items.name: Jonas Park
items.description: A two-person indie team shipping a calm product. Teaches Shipcraft, a six-week cohort for indie founders.

items.name: Wren Holloway
items.description: Writes a long essay every six weeks at wren.studio. Works alongside the StoicSoft engineers on the words in our products.

items.name: Amara Reyes
items.description: Leads the retrieval + citations work. Previously at a large AI lab, now preferring a smaller table.

items.name: Elena Faro
items.description: A feature every Sunday on the photo journal. Print editions of 25 on Hahnemühle Photo Rag, shipped from the Lisbon studio.

items.name: Nadia Reyes
items.description: On-call rotation lead. Pages when things break. Wrote the five alerts that actually wake us up.

items.name: Diogo Almeida
items.description: Keeps the books at Open Roots, the reforestation cooperative. Previously at a boutique law firm in Lisbon.
